title: Short Note
---

This is a short inbox document with no markdown headings. It is below the
long-source threshold (1500 chars × 3 = 4500 chars) so the builder must emit
a single consolidated ``whole`` SourcePageReviewItem, not per-section items.
The body is intentionally less than four paragraphs of substantive prose so
size stays in the short-source band of the layout decision.
